billing_project_id.description: Project to bill on endpoint uptime usage.

name.description: The name of the firewall endpoint resource.

location.description: The location (zone) of the firewall endpoint.

parent.description: The name of the parent this firewall endpoint belongs to. Format: organizations/{organization_id}.

labels.description: A map of key/value label pairs to assign to the resource. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.
